zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine於1130年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊時，她的父親Guy de Baudement32歲，母親Alix30歲。她於大約1148年與Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1218年7月11日在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊享年88歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine于1130年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊时，她的父亲Guy de Baudement32岁，母亲Alix30岁。她于大约1148年与Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1218年7月11日在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊享年88岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine was born in 1130, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Guy de Baudement, was 32 and her mother, Alix, was 30. She married Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine about 1148. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 11 July 1218, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 88, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine est née en 1130, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Guy de Baudement, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alix, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine environ 1148. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1218, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine 1130 in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Baudement 32 und ihre Mutter Alix 30. Sie hat um 1148 Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1218 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine è nata il nel 1130 nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Guy de Baudement, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alix, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine circa 1148. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 luglio 1218, nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braineが1130年にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで生まれた時，父Guy de Baudementは32歳，母Alixは30歳であった。約1148年にMilon III de Bar-sur-Seineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1218年7月11日にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで88歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine(이)가 1130년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Baudement(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 7월 11일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine nasceu em 1130, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guy de Baudement, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alix, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine aproximadamente 1148. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de julho de 1218, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine родилась в 1130 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Baudement было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alix, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine около 1148 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 июля 1218 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine nació en 1130, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guy de Baudement, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alix, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Milon III de Bar-sur-Seine aproximadamente 1148. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de julio de 1218, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
